svg.title: Role-Based Prompting — Founder Edition, ABTalks 60-Day Claude AI Mastery Challenge
svg.desc: LinkedIn post graphic with Founder spotlight on Role-Based Prompting, showing before/after comparison and five persona cards with Founder highlighted.
svg.text: ABTALK S · 60-DAY CLAUDE AI MASTERY CHALLENGE
Turn Claude into Any Expert You Need
"You are a YC-backed SaaS founder. Write a cold email to a Fortune 500 procurement head."
"You are a bootstrapped founder. Give me a 90-day go-to-market plan with zero ad spend."
"You are a founder who just missed runway. Draft a bridge financing ask to your lead investor."
